---
title: "子宫肌瘤单细胞分析 - VMP1 和 MICU1"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "显示代码"
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 6
    fig-format: retina
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  cache: true
  freeze: auto
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: "#>"
---

# 简介

本分析旨在研究 **VMP1** 和 **MICU1** 基因在子宫肌瘤中的表达模式。

## 分析流程

1. 下载并分析 GSE169255 (RNA-seq) 数据，确定 VMP1 和 MICU1 的差异表达状态
2. 下载并处理 GSE162122 (scRNA-seq) 数据
3. 生成图3a: UMAP 聚类图
4. 生成图3c: 热图（细胞类型特异性表达）
5. 生成图3d: FeaturePlot（基因表达分布）

# 环境设置

```{r setup}
#| label: setup
#| cache: false

# 设置工作目录
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))

# 加载必要的包
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GEOquery)
  library(DESeq2)
  library(Seurat)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(dplyr)
  library(biomaRt)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(patchwork)
  library(tidyr)
  library(readr)
})

# 创建输出目录
dirs <- c("data", "results", "figures", "cache")
for (dir in dirs) {
  if (!dir.exists(dir)) dir.create(dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
}

cat("环境设置完成\n")
cat("工作目录:", getwd(), "\n")
```

# 阶段1: 下载 GSE169255 (RNA-seq)

```{r download-gse169255}
#| label: download-gse169255
#| cache: true
#| cache.lazy: false

cat("=== 阶段1: 下载 GSE169255 ===\n")

# 检查文件是否已存在
if (!file.exists("data/GSE169255_sample_id_ReadsperGene.txt")) {
  cat("正在下载 GSE169255...\n")
  
  # 方法1: 使用 GEOquery
tryCatch({
    gse169255 <- getGEO("GSE169255", GSEMatrix = TRUE, getGPL = FALSE, 
                       destdir = "data")
    # 提取表达矩阵
    exprs_data <- exprs(gse169255[[1]])
    write.table(exprs_data, "data/GSE169255_expression_matrix.txt", 
                sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)
    cat("✓ GSE169255 下载完成\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("⚠ GEOquery 下载失败，请手动下载:\n")
    cat("  https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE169255\n")
    cat("  下载后放到 data/ 目录\n")
  })
} else {
  cat("✓ GSE169255 数据文件已存在\n")
}
```

# 阶段2: RNA-seq 差异表达分析

```{r rnaseq-analysis}
#| label: rnaseq-analysis
#| cache: true
#| dependson: download-gse169255

cat("\n=== 阶段2: RNA-seq 差异表达分析 ===\n")

# 读取计数矩阵
counts_file <- "data/GSE169255_sample_id_ReadsperGene.txt"
if (!file.exists(counts_file)) {
  stop("错误: 找不到 GSE169255 数据文件")
}

gse169255_counts <- read.table(counts_file, header = TRUE, row.names = 1, sep = "\t")
cat("读取了", nrow(gse169255_counts), "个基因,", ncol(gse169255_counts), "个样本\n")

# 创建样本信息（15个子宫肌层 + 15个子宫肌瘤）
gse169255_coldata <- data.frame(
  tissue = factor(c(rep("myometrium", 15), rep("fibroid", 15)),
                  levels = c("myometrium", "fibroid"))
)
row.names(gse169255_coldata) <- colnames(gse169255_counts)

# DESeq2 分析
cat("运行 DESeq2...\n")
dds_gse169255 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = gse169255_counts,
  colData = gse169255_coldata,
  design = ~ tissue
)

# 过滤低表达基因
keep_gse169255 <- rowSums(counts(dds_gse169255)) >= 10
dds_gse169255 <- dds_gse169255[keep_gse169255,]
cat("过滤后剩余", nrow(dds_gse169255), "个基因\n")

# 运行 DESeq2
dds_gse169255 <- DESeq(dds_gse169255, quiet = TRUE)

# 获取结果
res_gse169255 <- results(dds_gse169255, pAdjustMethod = 'fdr')
res_gse169255_df <- data.frame(res_gse169255)

# 查看 VMP1 和 MICU1 的结果
cat("\n=== VMP1 和 MICU1 差异表达结果 ===\n")

genes_of_interest <- c("VMP1", "MICU1")
results_list <- list()

for (gene in genes_of_interest) {
  if (gene %in% rownames(res_gse169255_df)) {
    gene_result <- res_gse169255_df[gene, ]
    results_list[[gene]] <- gene_result
    
    cat("\n", gene, ":\n", sep = "")
    cat("  log2FoldChange:", round(gene_result$log2FoldChange, 3), "\n")
    cat("  padj:", format(gene_result$padj, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
    
    # 判断调控状态
    if (is.na(gene_result$padj)) {
      regulation <- "NA"
    } else if (gene_result$padj < 0.05 && gene_result$log2FoldChange > 0) {
      regulation <- "up"
      cat("  调控: 上调 (up)\n")
    } else if (gene_result$padj < 0.05 && gene_result$log2FoldChange < 0) {
      regulation <- "down"
      cat("  调控: 下调 (down)\n")
    } else {
      regulation <- "not_significant"
      cat("  调控: 不显著\n")
    }
    
    results_list[[gene]]$regulation <- regulation
  } else {
    cat("\n警告: 基因", gene, "未在数据中找到\n")
  }
}

# 保存结果
write.csv(res_gse169255_df, "results/GSE169255_DEG_results.csv")

results_summary <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(results_list),
  log2FoldChange = sapply(results_list, function(x) x$log2FoldChange),
  padj = sapply(results_list, function(x) x$padj),
  Regulation = sapply(results_list, function(x) x$regulation)
)
write.csv(results_summary, "results/VMP1_MICU1_regulation_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n✓ RNA-seq 分析完成，结果已保存\n")
```

# 阶段3: 检查单细胞数据

```{r check-scrna}
#| label: check-scrna

cat("\n=== 阶段3: 检查单细胞数据 ===\n")

if (!dir.exists("data/GSE162122_RAW")) {
  cat("⚠ 警告: GSE162122_RAW 目录不存在\n")
  cat("\n请手动下载 GSE162122 单细胞数据:\n")
  cat("  https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE162122\n")
  cat("\n下载步骤:\n")
  cat("  1. 点击 'SRA Run Selector' 或下载补充文件\n")
  cat("  2. 下载所有 10X Genomics 数据文件\n")
  cat("  3. 解压到 data/GSE162122_RAW/ 目录\n")
  cat("\n数据应包含以下文件（每个样本）:\n")
  cat("  - barcodes.tsv.gz\n")
  cat("  - features.tsv.gz\n")
  cat("  - matrix.mtx.gz\n")
  
  # 创建示例目录结构
  dir.create("data/GSE162122_RAW", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  cat("\n已创建 data/GSE162122_RAW/ 目录，请放入数据文件\n")
} else {
  dirs <- list.dirs(path = "data/GSE162122_RAW", recursive = FALSE)
  cat("✓ GSE162122_RAW 目录存在\n")
  cat("  找到", length(dirs), "个样本目录\n")
  if (length(dirs) > 0) {
    cat("  样本:", paste(head(dirs, 3), collapse = ", "), "...\n")
  }
}
```

# 阶段4: 单细胞数据处理

```{r scrna-processing}
#| label: scrna-processing
#| cache: true
#| dependson: check-scrna
#| cache.lazy: false

cat("\n=== 阶段4: 单细胞数据处理 ===\n")

# 检查数据是否存在
if (!dir.exists("data/GSE162122_RAW") || 
    length(list.dirs("data/GSE162122_RAW", recursive = FALSE)) == 0) {
  cat("⚠ 跳过单细胞分析: 数据不存在\n")
  cat("  请先下载 GSE162122 数据\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

# 读取单细胞数据
dirs <- list.dirs(path = "data/GSE162122_RAW", recursive = FALSE)
cat("读取", length(dirs), "个样本...\n")

data_list <- lapply(dirs, FUN = function(x){
  Read10X(x)
})

names(data_list) <- sapply(dirs, FUN = function(x){
  sub('.*/', '', x)
})

cat("✓ 读取完成\n")

# 分离子宫肌瘤和子宫肌层
seurat_myo_list <- lapply(
  data_list[grepl(pattern = "Myo|myo", names(data_list))], 
  FUN = function(x){
    CreateSeuratObject(counts = x, project = "Myometrium", 
                       min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
  }
)

seurat_fib_list <- lapply(
  data_list[grepl(pattern = "Fibroid|fibroid", names(data_list))], 
  FUN = function(x){
    CreateSeuratObject(counts = x, project = "Fibroid", 
                       min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
  }
)

cat("子宫肌层样本数:", length(seurat_myo_list), "\n")
cat("子宫肌瘤样本数:", length(seurat_fib_list), "\n")

# 添加患者ID
for (i in seq_along(seurat_myo_list)){
  seurat_myo_list[[i]][["patient.id"]] <- gsub('_.*', '', names(seurat_myo_list)[i])
}

for (i in seq_along(seurat_fib_list)){
  seurat_fib_list[[i]][["patient.id"]] <- gsub('_.*', '', names(seurat_fib_list)[i])
}

cat("✓ 单细胞数据加载完成\n")
```

# 阶段5: 质量控制

```{r qc}
#| label: qc
#| cache: true
#| dependson: scrna-processing

cat("\n=== 阶段5: 质量控制 ===\n")

# 计算质控指标
cat("计算质控指标...\n")

for (i in seq_along(seurat_myo_list)){
  seurat_myo_list[[i]][["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(
    seurat_myo_list[[i]], pattern = "^MT-")
  seurat_myo_list[[i]][["percent.hemo"]] <- tryCatch({
    PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_myo_list[[i]], features = c("HBA1", "HBA2", "HBB"))
  }, error = function(e){ return(0) })
  seurat_myo_list[[i]][["percent.endometrioid"]] <- tryCatch({
    PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_myo_list[[i]], features = c("EPCAM", "KRT18"))
  }, error = function(e){ return(0) })
}

for (i in seq_along(seurat_fib_list)){
  seurat_fib_list[[i]][["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(
    seurat_fib_list[[i]], pattern = "^MT-")
  seurat_fib_list[[i]][["percent.hemo"]] <- tryCatch({
    PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_fib_list[[i]], features = c("HBA1", "HBA2", "HBB"))
  }, error = function(e){ return(0) })
  seurat_fib_list[[i]][["percent.endometrioid"]] <- tryCatch({
    PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_fib_list[[i]], features = c("EPCAM", "KRT18"))
  }, error = function(e){ return(0) })
}

# QC 过滤
cat("应用 QC 过滤...\n")
seurat_myo_list <- lapply(seurat_myo_list, FUN = function(x){
  subset(x, subset = nFeature_RNA < 2500 & percent.mt < 7 & 
           percent.hemo < 1 & percent.endometrioid == 0)
})

seurat_fib_list <- lapply(seurat_fib_list, FUN = function(x){
  subset(x, subset = nFeature_RNA < 2500 & percent.mt < 7 & 
           percent.hemo < 1 & percent.endometrioid == 0)
})

# 统计过滤后的细胞数
total_myo_cells <- sum(sapply(seurat_myo_list, ncol))
total_fib_cells <- sum(sapply(seurat_fib_list, ncol))

cat("✓ QC 完成\n")
cat("  子宫肌层细胞数:", total_myo_cells, "\n")
cat("  子宫肌瘤细胞数:", total_fib_cells, "\n")
```

# 阶段6: 标准化和整合

```{r normalization}
#| label: normalization
#| cache: true
#| dependson: qc
#| cache.lazy: false

cat("\n=== 阶段6: 标准化和整合 ===\n")

# SCTransform 标准化
cat("标准化子宫肌层样本...\n")
seurat_myo_list <- suppressMessages(lapply(seurat_myo_list, SCTransform, verbose = FALSE))

cat("标准化子宫肌瘤样本...\n")
seurat_fib_list <- suppressMessages(lapply(seurat_fib_list, SCTransform, verbose = FALSE))

# 选择整合特征
cat("选择整合特征...\n")
features_myo <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = seurat_myo_list, nfeatures = 3000)
features_fib <- SelectIntegrationFeatures(object.list = seurat_fib_list, nfeatures = 3000)

# 整合数据
cat("整合子宫肌层数据...\n")
anchors_myo <- suppressMessages(FindIntegrationAnchors(
  object.list = seurat_myo_list, 
  anchor.features = features_myo,
  verbose = FALSE
))

cat("整合子宫肌瘤数据...\n")
anchors_fib <- suppressMessages(FindIntegrationAnchors(
  object.list = seurat_fib_list, 
  anchor.features = features_fib,
  verbose = FALSE
))

seurat_combined_myo <- suppressMessages(IntegrateData(anchorset = anchors_myo, verbose = FALSE))
seurat_combined_fib <- suppressMessages(IntegrateData(anchorset = anchors_fib, verbose = FALSE))

# PCA 和 UMAP
cat("运行 PCA 和 UMAP...\n")
DefaultAssay(seurat_combined_myo) <- "integrated"
DefaultAssay(seurat_combined_fib) <- "integrated"

seurat_combined_myo <- SCTransform(seurat_combined_myo, verbose = FALSE)
seurat_combined_fib <- SCTransform(seurat_combined_fib, verbose = FALSE)

seurat_combined_myo <- RunPCA(seurat_combined_myo, npcs = 30, verbose = FALSE)
seurat_combined_fib <- RunPCA(seurat_combined_fib, npcs = 30, verbose = FALSE)

seurat_combined_myo <- RunUMAP(seurat_combined_myo, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
seurat_combined_fib <- RunUMAP(seurat_combined_fib, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)

seurat_combined_myo <- FindNeighbors(seurat_combined_myo, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)
seurat_combined_fib <- FindNeighbors(seurat_combined_fib, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:20, verbose = FALSE)

seurat_combined_myo <- FindClusters(seurat_combined_myo, resolution = 0.5, verbose = FALSE)
seurat_combined_fib <- FindClusters(seurat_combined_fib, resolution = 0.5, verbose = FALSE)

cat("✓ 标准化和整合完成\n")
cat("  子宫肌层聚类数:", length(unique(seurat_combined_myo$seurat_clusters)), "\n")
cat("  子宫肌瘤聚类数:", length(unique(seurat_combined_fib$seurat_clusters)), "\n")
```

# 阶段7: 细胞类型鉴定

```{r celltyping}
#| label: celltyping
#| cache: true
#| dependson: normalization

cat("\n=== 阶段7: 细胞类型鉴定 ===\n")

# 鉴定细胞类型标记基因
cat("寻找标记基因...\n")
seurat_combined_myo <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(seurat_combined_myo, assay = "SCT")
seurat_combined_fib <- PrepSCTFindMarkers(seurat_combined_fib, assay = "SCT")

myo_de_genes <- FindAllMarkers(seurat_combined_myo, assay = "SCT", 
                                only.pos = TRUE, verbose = FALSE)
fib_de_genes <- FindAllMarkers(seurat_combined_fib, assay = "SCT", 
                                only.pos = TRUE, verbose = FALSE)

# 根据标记基因定义细胞类型
# 注意: 这些聚类编号可能需要根据实际数据调整
seurat_combined_myo[["cell.type"]] <- sapply(
  seurat_combined_myo$seurat_clusters, 
  FUN = function(x){
    cell.type <- ifelse(x %in% c(0), "smc",
                        ifelse(x %in% c(7), "fibroblast",
                               ifelse(x %in% c(2, 4, 6, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16), "endothelial",
                                      ifelse(x %in% c(1, 3, 8, 10, 18), "lymphoid",
                                             ifelse(x %in% c(5, 13, 17), "myeloid", NA)))))
    return(cell.type)
  }
)

seurat_combined_fib[["cell.type"]] <- sapply(
  seurat_combined_fib$seurat_clusters, 
  FUN = function(x){
    cell.type <- ifelse(x %in% c(0, 1, 2, 4, 5, 13, 14), "smc",
                        ifelse(x %in% c(17), "fibroblast",
                               ifelse(x %in% c(7, 9, 10, 11), "endothelial",
                                      ifelse(x %in% c(3, 6, 8, 15), "lymphoid",
                                             ifelse(x %in% c(12, 16), "myeloid", NA)))))
    return(cell.type)
  }
)

seurat_combined_myo$cell.type <- factor(
  seurat_combined_myo$cell.type, 
  levels = c("smc", "fibroblast", "endothelial", "lymphoid", "myeloid")
)
seurat_combined_fib$cell.type <- factor(
  seurat_combined_fib$cell.type, 
  levels = c("smc", "fibroblast", "endothelial", "lymphoid", "myeloid")
)

# 统计各细胞类型数量
cat("\n子宫肌层细胞类型分布:\n")
print(table(seurat_combined_myo$cell.type))

cat("\n子宫肌瘤细胞类型分布:\n")
print(table(seurat_combined_fib$cell.type))

cat("✓ 细胞类型鉴定完成\n")

# 保存 Seurat 对象
cat("保存 Seurat 对象...\n")
saveRDS(seurat_combined_myo, file = "results/GSE162122_Myometrium_Combined.RDS")
saveRDS(seurat_combined_fib, file = "results/GSE162122_Fibroid_Combined.RDS")
write.csv(myo_de_genes, "results/myo_de_genes_scrnaseq.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(fib_de_genes, "results/fib_de_genes_scrnaseq.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

# 阶段8: 生成图3a - UMAP聚类图

```{r figure3a}
#| label: figure3a
#| cache: true
#| dependson: celltyping
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 5

cat("\n=== 阶段8: 生成图3a (UMAP聚类图) ===\n")

# 定义颜色
cell_type_colors <- c(
  "smc" = "#1f77b4", 
  "fibroblast" = "#ff7f0e",
  "endothelial" = "#2ca02c",
  "lymphoid" = "#d62728",
  "myeloid" = "#9467bd"
)

# 子宫肌瘤 UMAP
fig3a_fib <- DimPlot(
  seurat_combined_fib, 
  group.by = "cell.type", 
  label = TRUE, 
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = cell_type_colors
) +
  ggtitle("Uterine Fibroid") +
  theme_minimal() +
  NoLegend()

# 子宫肌层 UMAP
fig3a_myo <- DimPlot(
  seurat_combined_myo, 
  group.by = "cell.type", 
  label = TRUE, 
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = cell_type_colors
) +
  ggtitle("Myometrium") +
  theme_minimal()

# 合并
fig3a <- fig3a_fib + fig3a_myo

# 显示
print(fig3a)

# 保存
ggsave("figures/Figure3a_UMAP.pdf", fig3a, width = 12, height = 5)
ggsave("figures/Figure3a_UMAP.png", fig3a, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)

cat("✓ 图3a 已保存到 figures/ 目录\n")
```

# 阶段9: 生成图3c - 热图

```{r figure3c}
#| label: figure3c
#| cache: true
#| dependson: celltyping
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 6

cat("\n=== 阶段9: 生成图3c (热图) ===\n")

# 提取 VMP1 和 MICU1 在子宫肌瘤中的表达
genes_of_interest <- c("VMP1", "MICU1")

# 检查基因是否存在
available_genes <- rownames(seurat_combined_fib)
if (!all(genes_of_interest %in% available_genes)) {
  missing_genes <- genes_of_interest[!genes_of_interest %in% available_genes]
  cat("警告：以下基因未找到:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  genes_of_interest <- genes_of_interest[genes_of_interest %in% available_genes]
}

if (length(genes_of_interest) == 0) {
  cat("错误: 没有找到任何目标基因\n")
} else {
  cat("分析基因:", paste(genes_of_interest, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # 获取伪批量数据
  fib_data <- FetchData(seurat_combined_fib, vars = c("cell.type", genes_of_interest))
  
  # 创建伪批量矩阵
  fib_pseudo <- data.frame()
  cell_types <- levels(factor(fib_data$cell.type))
  
  for (cell_type in cell_types) {
    data <- fib_data[fib_data$cell.type == cell_type, genes_of_interest, drop = FALSE]
    mean_expr <- colMeans(data)
    fib_pseudo <- rbind(fib_pseudo, mean_expr)
  }
  
  row.names(fib_pseudo) <- cell_types
  fib_pseudo <- as.matrix(fib_pseudo)
  fib_pseudo <- t(fib_pseudo)  # 转置，使基因为行，细胞类型为列
  
  # 重新排序细胞类型
  cell_type_order <- c("smc", "fibroblast", "endothelial", "lymphoid", "myeloid")
  fib_pseudo <- fib_pseudo[, cell_type_order, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 创建行注释（显示上调/下调）
  row_annotation <- data.frame(
    Regulation = sapply(rownames(fib_pseudo), function(gene) {
      if (gene %in% names(results_list)) {
        return(results_list[[gene]]$regulation)
      } else {
        return("unknown")
      }
    })
  )
  rownames(row_annotation) <- rownames(fib_pseudo)
  
  # 定义颜色
  ann_colors <- list(
    Regulation = c(
      up = "red", 
      down = "blue", 
      not_significant = "grey", 
      unknown = "white",
      NA = "white"
    )
  )
  
  # 绘制热图
  fig3c <- pheatmap(
    fib_pseudo, 
    scale = "row", 
    cluster_rows = FALSE, 
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    border_color = "grey",
    fontsize = 12,
    fontsize_row = 12,
    fontsize_col = 12,
    main = "Cell type-specific expression of VMP1 and MICU1",
    annotation_row = row_annotation,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors,
    angle_col = 45
  )
  
  # 保存
  pdf("figures/Figure3c_Heatmap.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
  print(fig3c)
  dev.off()
  
  png("figures/Figure3c_Heatmap.png", width = 800, height = 600, res = 100)
  print(fig3c)
  dev.off()
  
  # 保存伪批量数据
  write.csv(fib_pseudo, "results/pseudobulk_VMP1_MICU1.csv")
  
  cat("✓ 图3c 已保存到 figures/ 目录\n")
}
```

# 阶段10: 生成图3d - FeaturePlot

```{r figure3d}
#| label: figure3d
#| cache: true
#| dependson: celltyping
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

cat("\n=== 阶段10: 生成图3d (FeaturePlot) ===\n")

# 检查基因是否存在
if (length(genes_of_interest) > 0) {
  # FeaturePlot
  fig3d <- FeaturePlot(
    seurat_combined_fib, 
    features = genes_of_interest,
    pt.size = 0.5,
    order = TRUE,
    cols = c("lightgrey", "darkred"),
    min.cutoff = 0,
    max.cutoff = "q95"
  ) &
    theme_minimal() &
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))
  
  # 显示
  print(fig3d)
  
  # 保存
  ggsave("figures/Figure3d_FeaturePlot.pdf", fig3d, width = 10, height = 5)
  ggsave("figures/Figure3d_FeaturePlot.png", fig3d, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  
  cat("✓ 图3d 已保存到 figures/ 目录\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ 跳过图3d: 没有找到目标基因\n")
}
```

# 结果汇总

```{r summary}
#| label: summary

cat("\n=== 分析完成汇总 ===\n\n")

cat("1. RNA-seq 分析结果:\n")
if (exists("results_summary")) {
  print(results_summary)
} else {
  cat("   请查看 results/VMP1_MICU1_regulation_summary.csv\n")
}

cat("\n2. 生成的文件:\n")
cat("   - figures/Figure3a_UMAP.pdf/png\n")
cat("   - figures/Figure3c_Heatmap.pdf/png\n")
cat("   - figures/Figure3d_FeaturePlot.pdf/png\n")

cat("\n3. 结果文件:\n")
cat("   - results/GSE169255_DEG_results.csv\n")
cat("   - results/VMP1_MICU1_regulation_summary.csv\n")
cat("   - results/GSE162122_Myometrium_Combined.RDS\n")
cat("   - results/GSE162122_Fibroid_Combined.RDS\n")
cat("   - results/pseudobulk_VMP1_MICU1.csv\n")

cat("\n✓ 所有分析完成!\n")
```

# 会话信息

```{r session-info}
#| label: session-info

sessionInfo()
```
